description: User switches to the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' tab and the prototype loads.
frame_description: The browser transitions from the 'Askable Sessions' tab to the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' prototype, showing a loading state before the content appears.

description: User scrolls down the list of opportunities to view 'In Person' and 'Diary Study' tasks.
frame_description: The view shifts from the top of the 'Short tasks & surveys' section down to reveal more task cards.

description: User scrolls back up to the top of the 'Short tasks & surveys' section.
frame_description: The view scrolls back up, returning the 'AI Interview' card and section header to the top of the screen.
